versions.title: Fix webhook URL, seed subscription tiers, add SITE_URL config
versions.summary: Corrects the Stripe Webhook URL shown in the admin panel so it reflects the public domain instead of the internal container address. Subscription tiers (Lite / Premium / Pro) are now auto-seeded on every cold start, so they always appear in the admin panel. Adds SITE_URL environment variable support.
added: SITE_URL environment variable — set to the public domain so the admin panel shows the correct Webhook URL behind Zeabur / reverse-proxy
seed_subscription_tiers() — idempotent seeder that inserts Lite / Premium / Pro tiers on first startup
Seed call added to _init_database() so tiers are always present after any cold start
modified: Admin Stripe settings endpoint now builds webhook_url from SITE_URL (or X-Forwarded-Host fallback) instead of request.host_url
.env.example now includes SITE_URL with the production domain pre-filled

versions.title: Stripe subscription system (Lite / Premium / Pro)
versions.summary: Implements a full Stripe subscription system with three tiers (currently only Lite is open). Includes a backend service layer, webhook handler, checkout/portal sessions, admin Stripe configuration panel, admin subscription tier management, and a public pricing page.
added: SubscriptionTier and UserSubscription database models
Alembic migration 002 for subscription tables
subscription_service.py — Stripe checkout, portal, webhook, and feature-flag helpers
GET /api/subscription/status — returns current user subscription state
POST /api/subscription/create-checkout-session — initiates Stripe Checkout flow
POST /api/subscription/create-portal-session — opens Stripe Customer Portal
POST /api/subscription/webhook — verifies and handles Stripe webhook events
Admin GET /api/admin/stripe/settings — masked key status + webhook URL
Admin GET /api/admin/subscription/tiers — list all tiers
Admin PUT /api/admin/subscription/tiers/<code> — toggle availability, set Price ID and feature flags
Admin console tabs: 金流設定 and 訂閱分級
Frontend /subscription pricing page (SubscriptionView.vue)
frontend/src/api/subscription.js API client
modified: Admin console now has Stripe configuration and tier management tabs
README-ZH-TW.md — added Stripe setup guide (5 steps)

versions.title: Auth persistence fix, admin route guard, homepage title update
versions.summary: Fixes a regression where database tables were only created when startup logging was active, causing auth failures on first request. Adds a Vue Router guard to block non-admin users from /admin. Updates the English homepage hero title.
added: Vue Router beforeEach guard — redirects non-admin users away from /admin
frontend/src/views/SubscriptionView.vue — pricing page scaffold
modified: _init_database() now runs unconditionally (moved outside the should_log_startup conditional)
English homepage hero title changed to 'Exploring Possible Futures'

versions.title: Persist account login data
versions.summary: Stores user accounts in a persistent /data directory and migrates legacy account data when available, preventing users from being forced to register again after redeploys.
added: Persistent USER_DATA_DIR support
Legacy users.json migration into the persistent data file
Docker /data volume declaration
modified: User account storage now defaults to /data in Docker deployments
Docker Compose now includes a named persistent data volume

versions.title: Add admin-visible version history
versions.summary: Adds a version management section inside the admin console so admins can review what changed in each deployed update.
added: version-history.json changelog source
Admin API endpoint for version history
Admin console version history panel
modified: Admin console now loads users and version history after authentication

versions.title: Assign first user as admin and resize logo
versions.summary: The first registered account is now the admin account, later registrations are normal users, and the header logo is resized to avoid cropping.
added: Admin role on the first registered user
Admin console shortcut for admin users
modified: Admin login now uses the first registered account
Existing users are normalized so only the first account is admin

versions.title: Add admin console and auth modal
versions.summary: Adds the admin console, user list editing, LLM settings management, and moves login/register into a modal beside the language switcher.
added: Admin console route at /admin
Admin user list and edit UI
Admin API for users
Auth modal opened from the fixed top-right login button

versions.title: Force Zeabur to build local Docker image
versions.summary: Makes Zeabur build from this repository instead of relying on the old upstream image.
added: zbpack.json pointing to the root Dockerfile
modified: docker-compose now builds the local image
deleted: Old upstream Docker image reference removed in favor of local build

versions.title: Fix Zeabur dependency installation
versions.summary: Fixes deployment dependency installation so Zeabur can run the Vite frontend and backend together.
added: Production dependency entry for concurrently
modified: Dockerfile installs required dev tooling for the runtime dev server
